facebook.content:
Prayer Focus: Family

In the midst of life's busyness, our families often suffer from spiritual neglect. 

Let us declare: "God, I call forth the blessing of Your presence in my family, filling each member with Your love, wisdom, and protection."

As we pray, we ask the Lord to awaken a hunger for spiritual growth in our loved ones, and to provide us with wisdom to guide and discipline them in Your ways.
facebook.fullPost:
Prayer Focus: Family

In the midst of life's busyness, our families often suffer from spiritual neglect. 

Let us declare: "God, I call forth the blessing of Your presence in my family, filling each member with Your love, wisdom, and protection."

As we pray, we ask the Lord to awaken a hunger for spiritual growth in our loved ones, and to provide us with wisdom to guide and discipline them in Your ways.

Submit your prayer request
https://increasingfaith.net/prayer.html

#Prayer #Intercession #KingdomPrayer

instagram.content:
"Father, I pray that You would strengthen our families with unshakeable faith and unwavering love. As believers, we are the first and most influential spiritual leaders in our households, let Your power and presence be demonstrated in our homes today.

I declare that Your Word will be a lamp to our feet and a light to our path, guiding us in wisdom and protection.

tiktok.content: "As we pray for our families, we remember that faithfulness is a generational blessing: Psalm 78:3-4. 'Speak, O Lord, and I will speak. Let the heavens declare Your righteousness.' We declare our families will walk in the counsel of Your Word, not the counsel of the world."
